commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The PR is maintainer-labeled and the remaining blockers are auth/security ownership and upgrade-safety decisions rather than a safe autonomous repair lane.; Needs attention: The diff changes OAuth refresh-token ownership and can delete persisted credential material, so it needs maintainer auth/security review before merge.; Review finding: [P1] Avoid reviving the retired openai-codex owner — src/agents/auth-p... commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a canonical main-owner rule for openai-codex OAuth credentials, strips non-owner persisted OAuth credentials, shares in-flight refresh results, and adds focused auth-profile tests.

PR surface: Source +167, Tests +286. Total +453 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: a non-main agent store containing an openai-codex OAuth credential is stripped by the PR helper without proving that the main store already owns that credential. I did not run a mutating repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is maintainer-labeled and the remaining blockers are auth/security ownership and upgrade-safety decisions rather than a safe autonomous repair lane.
